# Elven Spear

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **0** · Tactics

*Item. Weapon.*

---

Attach to a **_Noldor_** or **_Silvan_** hero. Restricted.
**Action:** Discard a card from your hand to give attached hero +1 ATK until the end of the phase. Limit 3 times per phase.
